message:
refactor(show): extract batch storage-matching helpers; fix preloaded storage reuse

execute_routed duplicated inline path canonicalization and preloaded-
storage decisions in two branches. Extract batch_uses_preloaded_storage
(which compares against storage_ctx.paths.beads_dir when a context is
available) and routed_cli_for_batch (which clears db only for
is_external routes). Fixes a bug where a preloaded OpenStorageResult
whose beads_dir differed from local_beads_dir would be ignored.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
